mapper.select: SELECT * FROM b_supplier WHERE supplier_code = #{supplierCode} AND deleted_flag = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT po.purchase_order_id, po.purchase_order_no, po.project_name, po.purchase_type, poi.material_id, poi.material_code, poi.material_name, poi.purchase_quantity, poi.unit_price, poi.total_price, po.approval_status, po.create_time FROM b_purchase_order_item poi INNER JOIN b_purchase_order po ON poi.purchase_order_id = po.purchase_order_id WHERE poi.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND po.deleted_flag = 0 ORDER BY po.create_time DESC
